RAID LOG — Healthcare Integration, Clinic A Pilot
Prepared by: M. Okafor, PC. Week-of 2026-04-15.

RISKS
R1 | Vendor v2 API deprecation (90 days)
    Trigger: vendor released EOL notice 2026-04-10.
    Impact: High — core patient-lookup endpoint stops working.
    Likelihood: High (vendor confirmed).
    Owner: M. Okafor
    Mitigation: Schedule migration spike with lead engineer on return.

R2 | Scope expansion to clinics B + C before stabilization
    Trigger: PO ask in 2026-04-12 sync.
    Impact: High — destabilizes pilot metrics.
    Likelihood: Medium.
    Owner: Product Owner (K. Bell)
    Mitigation: Bring data-backed stabilization case to steering.

R3 | Lead engineer on paternity leave 4 weeks
    Impact: Medium.
    Likelihood: Certain.
    Owner: Eng Manager
    Mitigation: Cross-train backup engineer. (Trigger not logged.)

R4 | HL7 lab feed intermittent
    Impact: Medium.
    Likelihood: —
    Owner: IT Ops
    Mitigation: Investigate with vendor. (Details pending.)

ISSUES
I1 | Three new integration endpoints added mid-build; no testing plan for them yet.
    Owner: M. Okafor
    Next step: QA to scope by 2026-04-19.

ASSUMPTIONS
A1 | Clinic A staff will complete training before go-live expansion.
    Owner: Training Lead.

DEPENDENCIES
D1 | Vendor support window during cutover weekend.
    Owner: Vendor SM.

D2 | Internal IT for network cutover.
    Owner: IT Ops.

(Updated for 2026-04-15 steering.)
